title: fragaria fruticosa
intro: Fragaria fruticosa, also known as the wild strawberry or beach strawberry, is a species of flowering plant in the rose family that is native to the coastal regions of the Mediterranean. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, making it effective in treating wounds, skin irritations, and respiratory issues. The health benefits of Fragaria fruticosa include its ability to reduce fever, improve digestion, and boost the immune system. The herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
